title: Moonlit SMP
description: A mod-pack for the Moonlit Discord Server to play with.
body:
# Moonlit

Moonlit is a discord server for only girls! We've decided to create a modpack for us to play with. We have a dedicated server that you can play on with this modpack.

## What's added

We haven't added much to the modpack, keeping it pretty close to the vanilla game. Although the changes made are most noticable in the following areas:
- World generation
  - Terralith
- Farming and food
  - Farmer's delight
- Building
  - Chimes
  - Chipped
  - Macaw's Mods
- Gameplay
  - Useful Backpacks
  - You're in Grave Danger
  - Double Doors
  - Inventory Profiles Next
